tEn: VoxPoser: Composable 3D Value Maps for Robotic Manipulation with Language Models
tZh: VoxPoser：基于语言模型的可组合3D价值图用于机器人操作
sEn: LLMs and VLMs compose 3D value maps to zero-shot synthesize robot trajectories for diverse manipulation tasks.
sZh: 利用大语言模型和视觉语言模型构建3D价值图，零样本合成机器人轨迹，完成多种操作任务。
absEn: Large language models (LLMs) are shown to possess a wealth of actionable knowledge that can be extracted for robot manipulation in the form of reasoning and planning. Despite the progress, most still rely on pre-defined motion primitives to carry out the physical interactions with the environment, which remains a major bottleneck. In this work, we aim to synthesize robot trajectories, i.e., a dense sequence of 6-DoF end-effector waypoints, for a large variety of manipulation tasks given an open-set of instructions and an open-set of objects. We achieve this by first observing that LLMs excel at inferring affordances and constraints given a free-form language instruction. More importantly, by leveraging their code-writing capabilities, they can interact with a vision-language model (VLM) to compose 3D value maps to ground the knowledge into the observation space of the agent. The composed value maps are then used in a model-based planning framework to zero-shot synthesize closed-loop robot trajectories with robustness to dynamic perturbations. We further demonstrate how the proposed framework can benefit from online experiences by efficiently learning a dynamics model for scenes that involve contact-rich interactions. We present a large-scale study of the proposed method in both simulated and real-robot environments, showcasing the ability to perform a large variety of everyday manipulation tasks specified in free-form natural language. Videos and code at https://voxposer.github.io
absZh: 大型语言模型（LLM）被证明拥有丰富的可操作知识，可以以推理和规划的形式提取出来用于机器人操作。尽管取得了进展，大多数方法仍然依赖预定义的运动基元来与环境进行物理交互，这仍然是一个主要瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们旨在针对大量操作任务，根据开放式指令和开放式物体，合成机器人轨迹，即密集的6自由度末端执行器路径点序列。我们首先观察到，LLM在根据自由形式的语言指令推断可供性和约束方面表现出色。更重要的是，通过利用其代码编写能力，它们可以与视觉语言模型（VLM）交互，组合3D价值图，将知识锚定到智能体的观察空间中。组合后的价值图随后用于基于模型的规划框架，以零样本方式合成闭环机器人轨迹，并对动态扰动具有鲁棒性。我们进一步展示了所提出的框架如何通过有效学习涉及接触丰富交互的场景的动态模型，从在线经验中受益。我们在模拟和真实机器人环境中对所提出的方法进行了大规模研究，展示了执行由自由形式自然语言指定的各种日常操作任务的能力。视频和代码见 https://voxposer.github.io。

contrib.en: Proposes VoxPoser, a framework that extracts affordances and constraints from LLMs to compose 3D value maps for robot manipulation.
contrib.zh: 提出VoxPoser框架，从大语言模型中提取可供性和约束，组合成3D价值图用于机器人操作。

contrib.en: Leverages LLMs' code-writing to interact with VLMs, grounding knowledge into 3D observation space via value maps.
contrib.zh: 利用大语言模型的代码编写能力与视觉语言模型交互，通过价值图将知识锚定到3D观测空间。

contrib.en: Uses composed value maps in a model-based planning framework for zero-shot closed-loop trajectory synthesis.
contrib.zh: 在基于模型的规划框架中使用组合的价值图，实现零样本闭环轨迹合成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robustness to dynamic perturbations through fast replanning at 5 Hz.
contrib.zh: 通过5Hz的快速重规划，展示了对动态扰动的鲁棒性。

contrib.en: Shows efficient learning of dynamics models for contact-rich tasks by using zero-shot trajectories as exploration priors.
contrib.zh: 通过将零样本轨迹作为探索先验，展示了接触丰富任务中动力学模型的高效学习。

contrib.en: Validates on a large variety of everyday manipulation tasks in both simulation and real-world settings.
contrib.zh: 在仿真和真实环境中对多种日常操作任务进行了大规模验证。

limits.en: Relies on external perception modules, limiting tasks requiring holistic visual reasoning or fine-grained geometry.
limits.zh: 依赖外部感知模块，限制了需要整体视觉推理或细粒度几何的任务。

limits.en: Requires a general-purpose dynamics model for contact-rich tasks with same level of generalization.
limits.zh: 需要通用动力学模型才能以相同泛化水平处理接触丰富任务。

limits.en: Motion planner only considers end-effector trajectories, not whole-arm planning.
limits.zh: 运动规划器仅考虑末端执行器轨迹，未进行整臂规划。

limits.en: Manual prompt engineering is required for LLMs.
limits.zh: 需要为大语言模型手动设计提示词。

limits.en: Perception module is sensitive to object poses and less robust for object parts.
limits.zh: 感知模块对物体姿态敏感，对物体部件鲁棒性较差。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) are shown to possess a wealth of actionable knowledge that can be extracted for robot manipulation in the form of reasoning and planning. Despite the progress, most still rely on pre-defined motion primitives to carry out the physical interactions with the environment, which remains a major bottleneck. In this work, we aim to synthesize robot trajectories, i.e., a dense sequence of 6-DoF end-effector waypoints, for a large variety of manipulation tasks given an open-set of instructions and an open-set of objects. We achieve this by first observing that LLMs excel at inferring affordances and constraints given a free-form language instruction. More importantly, by leveraging their code-writing capabilities, they can interact with a vision-language model (VLM) to compose 3D value maps to ground the knowledge into the observation space of the agent. The composed value maps are then used in a model-based planning framework to zero-shot synthesize closed-loop robot trajectories with robustness to dynamic perturbations. We further demonstrate how the proposed framework can benefit from online experiences by efficiently learning a dynamics model for scenes that involve contact-rich interactions. We present a large-scale study of the proposed method in both simulated and real-robot environments, showcasing the ability to perform a large variety of everyday manipulation tasks specified in free-form natural language. Videos and code at voxposer.github.io. ††Correspondence to Wenlong Huang <wenlongh@stanford.edu>.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）被证明拥有丰富的可操作知识，可以以推理和规划的形式提取出来用于机器人操作。尽管取得了进展，大多数方法仍然依赖预定义的运动基元来与环境进行物理交互，这仍然是一个主要瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们旨在针对大量操作任务，在给定开放指令集和开放物体集的情况下，合成机器人轨迹，即密集的6自由度末端执行器路径点序列。我们首先观察到，LLM在根据自由形式语言指令推断可供性和约束方面表现出色。更重要的是，通过利用其代码编写能力，它们可以与视觉语言模型（VLM）交互，以组合3D价值图，将知识锚定到智能体的观测空间中。组合后的价值图随后被用于基于模型的规划框架中，以零样本方式合成闭环机器人轨迹，并对动态扰动具有鲁棒性。我们进一步展示了所提出的框架如何通过有效学习涉及接触丰富交互的场景的动态模型，从在线经验中受益。我们在模拟和真实机器人环境中对所提出的方法进行了大规模研究，展示了执行由自由形式自然语言指定的各种日常操作任务的能力。视频和代码见voxposer.github.io。††通讯作者：Wenlong Huang <wenlongh@stanford.edu>。

items.en: Keywords: Manipulation, Large Language Models, Model-based Planning
items.zh: 关键词：操作，大型语言模型，基于模型的规划

items.capEn: Figure 1: VoxPoser extracts language-conditioned affordances and constraints from LLMs and grounds them to the perceptual space using VLMs, using a code interface and without additional training to either component. The composed map is referred to as a 3D value map, which enables zero-shot synthesis of trajectories for large varieties of everyday manipulation tasks with an open-set of instructions and an open-set of objects.
items.capZh: 图1：VoxPoser从LLM中提取语言条件化的可供性和约束，并使用VLM将其锚定到感知空间，通过代码接口且无需对任一组件进行额外训练。组合后的地图称为3D价值图，能够为零样本合成各种日常操作任务的轨迹，支持开放指令集和开放物体集。

items.en: Language is a compressed medium through which humans distill and communicate their knowledge and experience of the world. Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising approach to capture this abstraction, learning to represent the world through projection into language space [1, 2, 3, 4]. While these models are believed to internalize generalizable knowledge as text, it remains a question about how to use it to enable embodied agents to physically act in the real world.
items.zh: 语言是一种压缩媒介，人类通过它来提炼和交流对世界的知识和经验。大型语言模型（LLM）已成为捕捉这种抽象的有前景的方法，通过学习将世界投影到语言空间中来表征世界[1, 2, 3, 4]。虽然这些模型被认为将可泛化的知识内化为文本，但如何利用它使具身智能体在现实世界中物理行动仍然是一个问题。

items.en: We look at the problem of grounding abstract language instructions (e.g., “set up the table”) in robot actions [5]. Prior works have leveraged lexical analysis to parse the instructions [6, 7, 8], while more recently language models have been used to decompose the instructions into a textual sequence of steps [9, 10, 11]. However, to enable physical interactions with the environment, existing approaches typically rely on a repertoire of pre-defined motion primitives (i.e., skills) that may be invoked by an LLM or a planner, and this reliance on individual skill acquisition is often considered a major bottleneck of the system due to the lack of large-scale robotic data. The question then arises: how can we leverage the wealth of internalized knowledge of LLMs at the even fine-grained action level for robots, without requiring laborious data collection or manual designs for each individual primitive?
items.zh: 我们关注将抽象语言指令（例如“摆好桌子”）锚定到机器人动作中的问题[5]。先前的工作利用词法分析来解析指令[6, 7, 8]，而最近语言模型被用于将指令分解为文本步骤序列[9, 10, 11]。然而，为了实现与环境的物理交互，现有方法通常依赖于一组预定义的运动基元（即技能），这些基元可由LLM或规划器调用，而这种对单个技能获取的依赖通常被认为是系统的主要瓶颈，因为缺乏大规模机器人数据。问题随之而来：我们如何利用LLM内化的大量知识，在更细粒度的动作层面上为机器人服务，而无需为每个基元进行费力的数据收集或手动设计？

items.en: In addressing this challenge, we first note that it is impractical for LLMs to directly output control actions in text, which are typically driven by high-frequency control signals in high-dimensional space. However, we find that LLMs excel at inferring language-conditioned affordances and constraints, and by leveraging their code-writing capabilities, they can compose dense 3D voxel maps that ground them in the visual space by orchestrating perception calls (e.g., via CLIP [12] or open-vocabulary detectors [13, 14, 15]) and array operations (e.g., via NumPy [16]). For example, given an instruction “open the top drawer and watch out for the vase”, LLMs can be prompted to infer: 1) the top drawer handle should be grasped, 2) the handle needs to be translated outwards, and 3) the robot should stay away from the vase. By generating Python code to invoke perception APIs, LLMs can obtain spatial-geometric information of relevant objects or parts and then manipulate the 3D voxels to prescribe reward or cost at relevant locations in observation space (e.g., the handle region is assigned high values while the surrounding of the vase is assigned low values). Finally, the composed value maps can serve as objective functions for motion planners to directly synthesize robot trajectories that achieve the given instruction 111The approach also bears resemblance and connections to potential field methods in path planning [17] and constrained optimization methods in manipulation planning [18]. , without requiring additional training data for each task or for the LLM. An illustration diagram and a subset of tasks we considered are shown in Fig. 1.
items.zh: 在应对这一挑战时，我们首先注意到，让LLM直接以文本形式输出控制动作是不切实际的，因为这些动作通常由高维空间中的高频控制信号驱动。然而，我们发现LLM在推断语言条件化的可供性和约束方面表现出色，并且通过利用其代码编写能力，它们可以通过编排感知调用（例如通过CLIP[12]或开放词汇检测器[13, 14, 15]）和数组操作（例如通过NumPy[16]），组合出密集的3D体素图，将其锚定到视觉空间中。例如，给定指令“打开顶层抽屉并小心花瓶”，LLM可以被提示推断：1）应该抓取顶层抽屉把手，2）把手需要向外平移，3）机器人应远离花瓶。通过生成Python代码来调用感知API，LLM可以获取相关物体或部件的空间几何信息，然后操作3D体素，在观测空间的相关位置指定奖励或成本（例如，把手区域被赋予高值，而花瓶周围被赋予低值）。最后，组合后的价值图可以作为运动规划器的目标函数，直接合成实现给定指令的机器人轨迹，而无需为每个任务或LLM提供额外的训练数据。该方法也与路径规划中的势场方法[17]和操作规划中的约束优化方法[18]有相似之处和联系。图1展示了示意图和我们考虑的部分任务。

items.en: We term this approach VoxPoser , a formulation that extracts affordances and constraints from LLMs to compose 3D value maps in observation space for guiding robotic interactions. Rather than relying on robotic data that are often of limited amount or variability, the method leverages LLMs for open-world reasoning and VLMs for generalizable visual grounding in a model-based planning framework that directly enables physical robot actions. We demonstrate its zero-shot generalization for open-set instructions with open-set objects for various everyday manipulation tasks. We further showcase how VoxPoser can also benefit from limited online interactions to efficiently learn a dynamics model that involves contact-rich interactions.
items.zh: 我们将这种方法称为VoxPoser，一种从LLM中提取可供性和约束以在观测空间中组合3D价值图来指导机器人交互的框架。该方法不依赖通常数量有限或变异性有限的机器人数据，而是利用LLM进行开放世界推理，利用VLM进行可泛化的视觉锚定，并采用基于模型的规划框架直接实现物理机器人动作。我们展示了其在开放指令和开放物体下的各种日常操作任务中的零样本泛化能力。我们进一步展示了VoxPoser如何从有限的在线交互中受益，以有效学习涉及接触丰富交互的动态模型。

items.en: Grounding Language Instructions. Language grounding has been studied extensively both in terms of intelligent agents [19, 20, 21, 22] and of robotics [23, 6, 24, 25, 5, 7, 26], where language can be used as a tool for compositional goal specification [5, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33], semantic anchor for training multi-modal representation [12, 34, 35], or as an intermediate substrate for planning and reasoning [36, 37, 38, 9, 10, 39, 40]. Prior works have looked at using classical tools such as lexical analysis, formal logic, and graphical models to interpret language instructions [27, 7, 6, 26]. More recently, end-to-end approaches, popularized by successful applications to offline domains [41, 42, 43, 1], have been applied to directly ground language instructions in robot interactions by learning from data with language annotations, spanning from model learning [44], imitation learning [45, 46, 30, 47, 48, 49, 50, 51, 52, 53, 54], to reinforcement learning [55, 56, 57]. Most closely related to our work is Sharma et al. [50], where an end-to-end cost predictor is optimized via supervised learning to map language instructions to 2D costmaps, which are used to steer a motion planner to generate preferred trajectories in a collision-free manner. In contrast, we rely on pre-trained language models for their open-world knowledge and tackle the more challenging robotic manipulation in 3D.
items.zh: 语言指令锚定。语言锚定在智能体[19, 20, 21, 22]和机器人[23, 6, 24, 25, 5, 7, 26]领域都得到了广泛研究，语言可以作为组合目标规范的工具[5, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33]、训练多模态表示的语义锚点[12, 34, 35]，或作为规划和推理的中间媒介[36, 37, 38, 9, 10, 39, 40]。先前的工作使用经典工具如词法分析、形式逻辑和图形模型来解释语言指令[27, 7, 6, 26]。最近，端到端方法因在离线领域的成功应用[41, 42, 43, 1]而流行，被用于通过从带有语言标注的数据中学习，直接锚定语言指令到机器人交互中，涵盖模型学习[44]、模仿学习[45, 46, 30, 47, 48, 49, 50, 51, 52, 53, 54]到强化学习[55, 56, 57]。与我们工作最相关的是Sharma等人[50]，其中通过监督学习优化端到端成本预测器，将语言指令映射到2D成本图，用于引导运动规划器以无碰撞方式生成偏好轨迹。相比之下，我们依赖预训练语言模型的开放世界知识，并处理更具挑战性的3D机器人操作。

items.en: Language Models for Robotics. Leveraging pre-trained language models for embodied applications is an active area of research, where a large body of works focus on planning and reasoning with language models [9, 10, 11, 58, 31, 39, 59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72, 36, 73, 74]. To allow language models to perceive the physical environments, textual descriptions of the scene [39, 11, 59] or perception APIs [75] can be given, vision can be used during decoding [67] or can be directly taken as input by multi-modal language models [68, 2]. In addition to perception, to truly bridge the perception-action loop, an embodied language model must also know how to act, which typically is achieved by a library of pre-defined primitives. Liang et al. [75] showed that LLMs exhibit behavioral commonsense that can be useful for low-level control. Despite the promising signs, hand-designed motion primitives are still required, and while LLMs are shown to be capable of composing sequential policy logic, it remains unclear whether composition can happen at spatial level. A related line of works has also explored using LLMs for reward specification in the context of reward design [76], exploration [77, 78, 79, 80], and preference learning [81]. For robotic applications, concurrent works explored LLM-based reward generation [82, 83, 84, 85, 86, 87, 88], among which Yu et al. [82] use MuJoCo [89] as a high-fidelity physics model for model predictive control. In contrast, we focus exclusively on grounding the reward generated by LLMs in the 3D observation space of the robot.
items.zh: 用于机器人的语言模型。利用预训练语言模型进行具身应用是一个活跃的研究领域，大量工作集中在使用语言模型进行规划和推理[9, 10, 11, 58, 31, 39, 59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72, 36, 73, 74]。为了让语言模型感知物理环境，可以提供场景的文本描述[39, 11, 59]或感知API[75]，也可以在解码过程中使用视觉[67]，或由多模态语言模型直接作为输入[68, 2]。除了感知，为了真正连接感知-动作循环，具身语言模型还必须知道如何行动，这通常通过预定义基元库实现。Liang等人[75]表明LLM表现出对低级控制有用的行为常识。尽管有这些有希望的迹象，仍然需要手动设计的运动基元，并且虽然LLM被证明能够组合顺序策略逻辑，但尚不清楚组合是否能在空间层面发生。相关工作还探索了在奖励设计[76]、探索[77, 78, 79, 80]和偏好学习[81]的背景下使用LLM进行奖励指定。对于机器人应用，并发工作探索了基于LLM的奖励生成[82, 83, 84, 85, 86, 87, 88]，其中Yu等人[82]使用MuJoCo[89]作为高保真物理模型进行模型预测控制。相比之下，我们专注于将LLM生成的奖励锚定到机器人的3D观测空间中。

items.en: Learning-based Trajectory Optimization. Many works have explored leveraging learning-based approaches for trajectory optimization. While the literature is vast, they can be broadly categorized into those that learn the models [90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96, 97, 98] and those that learn the cost/reward or constraints [99, 100, 101, 102, 50, 103], where data are typically collected from in-domain interactions. To enable generalization in the wild, a parallel line of works has explored learning task specification from large-scale offline data [104, 105, 106, 35, 34, 44, 107, 108, 54], particularly egocentric videos [109, 110], or leveraging pre-trained foundation models [111, 112, 113, 33, 114, 115]. The learned cost functions are then used by reinforcement learning [111, 108, 116], imitation learning [106, 105], or trajectory optimization [104, 35] to generate robot actions. In this work, we leverage LLMs for zero-shot in-the-wild cost specification with superior generalization. Compared to prior works that leverage foundation models, we ground the cost directly in 3D observation space with real-time visual feedback, which makes VoxPoser amenable to closed-loop MPC that’s robust in execution.
items.zh: 基于学习的轨迹优化。许多工作探索了利用基于学习的方法进行轨迹优化。尽管文献众多，但可以大致分为学习模型[90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96, 97, 98]和学习成本/奖励或约束[99, 100, 101, 102, 50, 103]两类，其中数据通常从领域内交互中收集。为了实现野外泛化，一系列并行工作探索了从大规模离线数据中学习任务规范[104, 105, 106, 35, 34, 44, 107, 108, 54]，特别是自我中心视频[109, 110]，或利用预训练的基础模型[111, 112, 113, 33, 114, 115]。学习到的成本函数随后被用于强化学习[111, 108, 116]、模仿学习[106, 105]或轨迹优化[104, 35]以生成机器人动作。在这项工作中，我们利用LLM进行零样本的野外成本指定，具有优越的泛化能力。与先前利用基础模型的工作相比，我们将成本直接锚定在3D观测空间中，并带有实时视觉反馈，这使得VoxPoser适用于执行鲁棒的闭环MPC。

items.en: We first provide the formulation of VoxPoser as an optimization problem (Sec. 3.1). Then we describe how VoxPoser can be used as a general zero-shot framework to map language instructions to 3D value maps (Sec. 3.2). We subsequently demonstrate how trajectories can be synthesized in closed-loop for robotic manipulation (Sec. 3.3). While zero-shot in nature, we demonstrate how VoxPoser can learn from online interactions to efficiently solve contact-rich tasks (Sec. 3.4).
items.zh: 我们首先将VoxPoser表述为一个优化问题（第3.1节）。然后描述VoxPoser如何作为一个通用的零样本框架，将语言指令映射到3D价值图（第3.2节）。随后展示如何为机器人操作合成闭环轨迹（第3.3节）。虽然本质上是零样本的，但我们展示了VoxPoser如何从在线交互中学习以有效解决接触丰富任务（第3.4节）。

items.en: Consider a manipulation problem given as a free-form language instruction ℒℒ\mathcal{L} (e.g., “open the top drawer”). Generating robot trajectories according to ℒℒ\mathcal{L} can be very challenging because ℒℒ\mathcal{L} may be arbitrarily long-horizon or under-specified (i.e., requires contextual understanding). Instead, we focus on individual phases (sub-tasks) of the problem ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i} that distinctively specify a manipulation task (e.g., “grasp the drawer handle”, “pull open the drawer”), where the decomposition ℒ→(ℓ1,ℓ2,…,ℓn)→ℒsubscriptℓ1subscriptℓ2…subscriptℓ𝑛\mathcal{L}\to(\ell_{1},\ell_{2},\dots,\ell_{n}) is given by a high-level planner (e.g., an LLM or a search-based planner) 222Note that the decomposition and sequencing of these sub-tasks are also done by LLMs in this work, though we do not investigate this aspect extensively as it is not the focus of our contributions.. The central problem investigated in this work is to generate a motion trajectory τi𝐫superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝐫\tau_{i}^{\mathbf{r}} for robot 𝐫𝐫\mathbf{r} and each manipulation phase described by instruction ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i}. We represent τi𝐫superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝐫\tau_{i}^{\mathbf{r}} as a sequence of dense end-effector waypoints to be executed by an Operational Space Controller [117], where each waypoint consists of a desired 6-DoF end-effector pose, end-effector velocity, and gripper action. However, it is worth noting that other representations of trajectories, such as joint space trajectories, can also be used. Given the i𝑖i-th sub-task described by ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i}, we formulate an optimization problem defined as follows:
items.zh: 考虑一个以自由形式语言指令ℒ（例如“打开顶层抽屉”）给出的操作问题。根据ℒ生成机器人轨迹可能非常具有挑战性，因为ℒ可能是任意长时域或欠指定的（即需要上下文理解）。相反，我们专注于问题的各个阶段（子任务）ℓ_i，它们明确指定了一个操作任务（例如“抓取抽屉把手”、“拉开抽屉”），其中分解ℒ→(ℓ_1, ℓ_2, …, ℓ_n)由高层规划器（例如LLM或基于搜索的规划器）给出。本工作研究的核心问题是为机器人𝐫和每个由指令ℓ_i描述的操作阶段生成运动轨迹τ_i^𝐫。我们将τ_i^𝐫表示为密集的末端执行器路径点序列，由操作空间控制器[117]执行，其中每个路径点由期望的6自由度末端执行器位姿、末端执行器速度和夹爪动作组成。但值得注意的是，其他轨迹表示，如关节空间轨迹，也可以使用。给定由ℓ_i描述的第i个子任务，我们定义如下优化问题：

items.en: where 𝐓isubscript𝐓𝑖\mathbf{T}_{i} is the evolution of environment state, and τi𝐫⊆𝐓isuperscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝐫subscript𝐓𝑖\tau_{i}^{\mathbf{r}}\subseteq\mathbf{T}_{i} is the robot trajectory. ℱt​a​s​ksubscriptℱ𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\mathcal{F}_{task} scores the extent of 𝐓isubscript𝐓𝑖\mathbf{T}_{i} completes the instruction ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i} while ℱc​o​n​t​r​o​lsubscriptℱ𝑐𝑜𝑛𝑡𝑟𝑜𝑙\mathcal{F}_{control} specifies the control costs, e.g., to encourage τi𝐫superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝐫\tau_{i}^{\mathbf{r}} to minimize total control effort or total time. 𝒞​(𝐓i)𝒞subscript𝐓𝑖\mathcal{C}(\mathbf{T}_{i}) denotes the dynamics and kinematics constraints, which are enforced by the known model of the robot and a physics-based or learning-based model of the environment. By solving this optimization for each sub-task ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i}, we obtain a sequence of robot trajectories that collectively achieve the overall task specified by the instruction ℒℒ\mathcal{L}.
items.zh: 其中𝐓_i是环境状态的演化，τ_i^𝐫 ⊆ 𝐓_i是机器人轨迹。ℱ_task评分𝐓_i完成指令ℓ_i的程度，而ℱ_control指定控制成本，例如鼓励τ_i^𝐫最小化总控制努力或总时间。𝒞(𝐓_i)表示动力学和运动学约束，由已知的机器人模型和基于物理或基于学习的环境模型强制执行。通过为每个子任务ℓ_i求解此优化，我们获得一系列机器人轨迹，共同实现由指令ℒ指定的整体任务。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of VoxPoser. Given the RGB-D observation of the environment and a language instruction, LLMs generate code, which interacts with VLMs, to produce a sequence of 3D affordance maps and constraint maps (collectively referred to as value maps) grounded in the observation space of the robot (a). The composed value maps then serve as objective functions for motion planners to synthesize trajectories for robot manipulation (b). The entire process does not involve any additional training.
items.capZh: 图2：VoxPoser概述。给定环境的RGB-D观测和语言指令，LLM生成代码，与VLM交互，产生一系列3D可供性图和约束图（统称为价值图），锚定在机器人的观测空间中（a）。组合后的价值图随后作为运动规划器的目标函数，为机器人操作合成轨迹（b）。整个过程不涉及任何额外训练。

full.secZh: 3.2 通过VoxPoser实现语言指令接地

items.en: Calculating ℱt​a​s​ksubscriptℱ𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\mathcal{F}_{task} with respect to free-form language instructions is extremely challenging, not only because of the rich space of semantics language can convey but also because of the lack of robot data labeled with 𝐓𝐓\mathbf{T} and ℓℓ\ell. However, we provide a critical observation that a large number of tasks can be characterized by a voxel value map 𝐕∈ℝw×h×d𝐕superscriptℝ𝑤ℎ𝑑\mathbf{V}\in\mathbb{R}^{w\times h\times d} in robot’s observation space, which guides the motion of an “entity of interest” in the scene, such as the robot end-effector, an object, or an object part. For example, consider the task “open the top drawer” and its first sub-task “grasp the top drawer handle” (inferred by LLMs) in Fig. 2. The “entity of interest” is the robot end-effector, and the voxel value map should reflect the attraction toward the drawer handle. By further commanding “watch out for the vase”, the map can also be updated to reflect the repulsion from the vase. We denote the “entity of interest” as 𝐞𝐞\mathbf{e} and its trajectory as τ𝐞superscript𝜏𝐞\tau^{\mathbf{e}}. Using this voxel value map for a given instruction ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i}, ℱt​a​s​ksubscriptℱ𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\mathcal{F}_{task} can be approximated by accumulating the values of 𝐞𝐞\mathbf{e} traversing through 𝐕isubscript𝐕𝑖\mathbf{V}_{i}, formally calculated as ℱt​a​s​k=−∑j=1|τi𝐞|𝐕​(pj𝐞)subscriptℱ𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘superscriptsubscript𝑗1superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝐞𝐕subscriptsuperscript𝑝𝐞𝑗\mathcal{F}_{task}=-\sum_{j=1}^{|\tau_{i}^{\mathbf{e}}|}\mathbf{V}(p^{\mathbf{e}}_{j}), where pj𝐞∈ℕ3subscriptsuperscript𝑝𝐞𝑗superscriptℕ3p^{\mathbf{e}}_{j}\in\mathbb{N}^{3} is the discretized (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) position of 𝐞𝐞\mathbf{e} at step j𝑗j.
items.zh: 计算相对于自由形式语言指令的ℱ_task极具挑战性，不仅因为语言可以传达丰富的语义空间，还因为缺乏用𝐓和ℓ标注的机器人数据。然而，我们提供了一个关键观察：大量任务可以通过机器人观测空间中的体素价值图𝐕∈ℝ^{w×h×d}来表征，该图引导场景中“感兴趣实体”的运动，例如机器人末端执行器、物体或物体部件。例如，考虑任务“打开顶层抽屉”及其第一个子任务“抓取顶层抽屉把手”（由LLM推断）如图2所示。“感兴趣实体”是机器人末端执行器，体素价值图应反映朝向抽屉把手的吸引力。通过进一步指令“小心花瓶”，地图也可以更新以反映远离花瓶的排斥力。我们将“感兴趣实体”记为𝐞，其轨迹记为τ^𝐞。使用针对给定指令ℓ_i的体素价值图，ℱ_task可以通过累积𝐞穿越𝐕_i的值来近似，正式计算为ℱ_task = -∑_{j=1}^{|τ_i^𝐞|} 𝐕(p_j^𝐞)，其中p_j^𝐞 ∈ ℕ^3是𝐞在第j步的离散化(x,y,z)位置。

items.en: Notably, we observe large language models, by being pre-trained on Internet-scale data, exhibit capabilities not only to identify the “entity of interest” but also to compose value maps that accurately reflect the task instruction by writing Python programs. Specifically, when an instruction is given as a comment in the code, LLMs can be prompted to 1) call perception APIs (which invoke vision-language models (VLM) such as an open-vocabulary detector [13, 14, 15]) to obtain spatial-geometrical information of relevant objects, 2) generate NumPy operations to manipulate 3D arrays, and 3) prescribe precise values at relevant locations. We term this approach as VoxPoser. Concretely, we aim to obtain a voxel value map 𝐕it=VoxPoser​(𝐨t,ℓi)superscriptsubscript𝐕𝑖𝑡VoxPosersuperscript𝐨𝑡subscriptℓ𝑖\mathbf{V}_{i}^{t}=\text{VoxPoser}(\mathbf{o}^{t},\ell_{i}) by prompting an LLM and executing the code via a Python interpreter, where 𝐨tsuperscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}^{t} is the RGB-D observation at time t𝑡t and ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i} is the current instruction. Additionally, because 𝐕𝐕\mathbf{V} is often sparse, we densify the voxel maps via smoothing operations, as they encourage smoother trajectories optimized by motion planners.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，我们观察到大型语言模型通过在海量互联网数据上预训练，不仅表现出识别“感兴趣实体”的能力，还能通过编写Python程序组合出准确反映任务指令的价值图。具体来说，当指令作为代码中的注释给出时，LLM可以被提示：1）调用感知API（调用视觉语言模型（VLM），如开放词汇检测器[13, 14, 15]）以获取相关物体的空间几何信息，2）生成NumPy操作以操作3D数组，3）在相关位置指定精确的值。我们将这种方法称为VoxPoser。具体地，我们通过提示LLM并通过Python解释器执行代码来获得体素价值图𝐕_i^t = VoxPoser(𝐨^t, ℓ_i)，其中𝐨^t是时间t的RGB-D观测，ℓ_i是当前指令。此外，由于𝐕通常是稀疏的，我们通过平滑操作使体素图密集化，因为这鼓励运动规划器优化出更平滑的轨迹。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Visualization of composed 3D value maps and rollouts in real-world environments. The top row demonstrates where “entity of interest” is an object or part, and the value maps guide them toward target positions. The bottom two rows showcase tasks where “entity of interest” is the robot end-effector. The bottom-most task involves two phases, which are also orchestrated by LLMs.
items.capZh: 图3：在真实世界环境中组合的3D价值图和展开的可视化。第一行展示了“感兴趣实体”是物体或部件的情况，价值图引导它们朝向目标位置。下面两行展示了“感兴趣实体”是机器人末端执行器的任务。最底部的任务涉及两个阶段，也由LLM编排。

items.en: Additional Trajectory Parametrization. The above formulation of VoxPoser uses LLMs to compose 𝐕:ℕ3→ℝ:𝐕→superscriptℕ3ℝ\mathbf{V}:\mathbb{N}^{3}\to\mathbb{R} to map from discretized coordinates in voxel space to a real-valued “cost”, which we can use to optimize a path consisting only of the positional terms. To extend to SE(3)3(3) poses, we can also use LLMs to compose rotation maps 𝐕r:ℕ3→SO​(3):subscript𝐕𝑟→superscriptℕ3SO3\mathbf{V}_{r}:\mathbb{N}^{3}\to\text{SO}(3) at coordinates relevant to the task objectives (e.g., “end-effector should face the support normal of the handle”). Similarly, we further compose gripper maps 𝐕g:ℕ3→{0,1}:subscript𝐕𝑔→superscriptℕ301\mathbf{V}_{g}:\mathbb{N}^{3}\to\{0,1\} to control gripper open/close and velocity maps 𝐕v:ℕ3→ℝ:subscript𝐕𝑣→superscriptℕ3ℝ\mathbf{V}_{v}:\mathbb{N}^{3}\to\mathbb{R} to specify target velocities. Note that while these additional trajectory parametrizations are not mapped to a real-valued “cost”, they can also be factored in the optimization procedure (Equation 1) to parametrize the trajectories.
items.zh: 额外的轨迹参数化。上述VoxPoser公式使用LLM组合𝐕: ℕ^3 → ℝ，将离散化的体素空间坐标映射到实值“成本”，我们可以用它来优化仅包含位置项的路径。为了扩展到SE(3)位姿，我们还可以使用LLM组合旋转图𝐕_r: ℕ^3 → SO(3)，在任务目标相关的坐标处（例如“末端执行器应朝向把手支撑法线”）。类似地，我们进一步组合夹爪图𝐕_g: ℕ^3 → {0,1}以控制夹爪开合，以及速度图𝐕_v: ℕ^3 → ℝ以指定目标速度。注意，虽然这些额外的轨迹参数化不映射到实值“成本”，但它们也可以纳入优化过程（方程1）以参数化轨迹。

full.secZh: 3.3 基于VoxPoser的零样本轨迹合成

items.en: After obtaining the task cost ℱt​a​s​ksubscriptℱ𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\mathcal{F}_{task}, we can now approach the full problem defined in Equation 1 to plan a motion trajectory. We use simple zeroth-order optimization by randomly sampling trajectories and scoring them with the proposed objective. The optimization is implemented in a model predictive control framework that iteratively replans the trajectory at every step using the current observation to robustly execute the trajectories even under dynamic disturbances 333Although involving an LLM in the loop, closed-loop execution is possible because the generated code remains the same throughout task ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i}, which allows us to cache its output for the current task. , where either a learned or physics-based model can be used. However, because VoxPoser effectively provides “dense rewards” in the observation space and we are able to replan at every step, we surprisingly find that the overall system can already achieve a large variety of manipulation tasks considered in this work even with simple heuristics-based models. Since some value maps are defined over “entity of interest”, which may not necessarily be the robot, we also use the dynamics model to find the needed robot trajectory to minimize the task cost (i.e., what interactions between the robot and the environment achieve the desired object motions).
items.zh: 在获得任务成本ℱ_task后，我们现在可以处理方程1中定义的完整问题以规划运动轨迹。我们使用简单的零阶优化，通过随机采样轨迹并用提出的目标函数评分。该优化在模型预测控制框架中实现，该框架在每一步使用当前观测迭代地重新规划轨迹，以在动态扰动下鲁棒地执行轨迹。其中可以使用学习或基于物理的模型。然而，由于VoxPoser在观测空间中有效地提供了“密集奖励”，并且我们能够在每一步重新规划，我们惊讶地发现，即使使用简单的基于启发式的模型，整个系统已经能够实现本工作中考虑的大量操作任务。由于一些价值图定义在“感兴趣实体”上，而该实体可能不一定是机器人，我们还使用动力学模型来找到所需的机器人轨迹以最小化任务成本（即机器人与环境之间的何种交互能实现期望的物体运动）。

full.sec: 3.4 Efficient Dynamics Learning with Online Experiences
full.secZh: 3.4 利用在线经验的高效动力学学习

items.en: While Sec. 3.3 presents a zero-shot framework for synthesizing trajectories for robot manipulation, VoxPoser can also benefit from online experiences by efficiently learning a dynamics model. Consider the standard setup where a robot interleaves between 1) collecting environment transition data (𝐨t,𝐚t,𝐨t+1)subscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡1(\mathbf{o}_{t},\mathbf{a}_{t},\mathbf{o}_{t+1}), where 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t} is the environment observation at time t𝑡t and 𝐚t=MPC​(𝐨t)subscript𝐚𝑡MPCsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{a}_{t}=\text{MPC}(\mathbf{o}_{t}), and 2) training a dynamics model 𝐠θsubscript𝐠𝜃\mathbf{g}_{\theta} parametrized by θ𝜃\theta by minimizing the L2 loss between predicted next observation 𝐨^t+1subscript^𝐨𝑡1\hat{\mathbf{o}}_{t+1} and 𝐨t+1subscript𝐨𝑡1\mathbf{o}_{t+1}. A critical component that determines the learning efficiency is the action sampling distribution P​(𝐚t|𝐨t)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡P(\mathbf{a}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) in MPC, which typically is a random distribution over the full action space 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}. This is often inefficient when the goal is to solve a particular task, such as opening a door, because most actions do not interact with the relevant objects in the scene (i.e., the door handle) nor do they necessarily interact with the objects in a meaningful way (i.e., pressing down the door handle). Since VoxPoser synthesizes robot trajectories with LLMs, which have a wealth of commonsense knowledge, the zero-shot synthesized trajectory τ0𝐫subscriptsuperscript𝜏𝐫0\tau^{\mathbf{r}}_{0} can serve as a useful prior to bias the action sampling distribution P​(𝐚t|𝐨t,τ0𝐫)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝐚𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝜏𝐫0P(\mathbf{a}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t},\tau^{\mathbf{r}}_{0}), which can significantly speed up the learning process. In practice, this can be implemented by only sampling actions in the vicinity of τ0𝐫subscriptsuperscript𝜏𝐫0\tau^{\mathbf{r}}_{0} by adding small noise ε𝜀\varepsilon to encourage local exploration instead of exploring in the full action space 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}.
items.zh: 虽然第3.3节提出了一个用于合成机器人操作轨迹的零样本框架，但VoxPoser也可以通过有效学习动力学模型从在线经验中受益。考虑标准设置，其中机器人在以下两者之间交替：1）收集环境转移数据(𝐨_t, 𝐚_t, 𝐨_{t+1})，其中𝐨_t是时间t的环境观测，𝐚_t = MPC(𝐨_t)；2）训练由θ参数化的动力学模型𝐠_θ，通过最小化预测的下一个观测𝐨̂_{t+1}与𝐨_{t+1}之间的L2损失。决定学习效率的关键组件是MPC中的动作采样分布P(𝐚_t|𝐨_t)，通常是整个动作空间𝐀上的随机分布。当目标是解决特定任务（如开门）时，这通常效率低下，因为大多数动作不与场景中的相关物体（即门把手）交互，也不一定以有意义的方式与物体交互（即按下门把手）。由于VoxPoser利用具有丰富常识知识的LLM合成机器人轨迹，零样本合成的轨迹τ^𝐫_0可以作为有用的先验来偏置动作采样分布P(𝐚_t|𝐨_t, τ^𝐫_0)，这可以显著加速学习过程。在实践中，这可以通过仅在τ^𝐫_0附近采样动作来实现，添加小噪声ε以鼓励局部探索，而不是在整个动作空间𝐀中探索。

items.en: We first discuss our implementation details. Then we validate VoxPoser for real-world everyday manipulation (Sec. 4.1). We also study its generalization in simulation (Sec. 4.2). We further demonstrate how VoxPoser enables efficient learning of more challenging tasks (Sec. 4.3). Finally, we analyze its source of errors and discuss how improvement can be made (Sec. 4.4).
items.zh: 我们首先讨论实现细节。然后，我们在真实世界的日常操作中验证VoxPoser（第4.1节）。我们还在仿真中研究其泛化能力（第4.2节）。我们进一步展示VoxPoser如何实现更具挑战性任务的高效学习（第4.3节）。最后，我们分析其错误来源并讨论如何改进（第4.4节）。

items.en: LLMs and Prompting. We follow prompting structure by Liang et al. [75], which recursively calls LLMs using their own generated code, where each language model program (LMP) is responsible for a unique functionality (e.g., processing perception calls). We use GPT-4 [2] from OpenAI API. For each LMP, we include 5-20 example queries and corresponding responses as part of the prompt. An example can be found in Fig. 2 (simplified for clarity). Full prompts are in Appendix.
items.zh: LLM与提示。我们遵循Liang等人[75]的提示结构，该结构通过递归调用LLM使用其自身生成的代码，其中每个语言模型程序（LMP）负责一个独特的功能（例如，处理感知调用）。我们使用OpenAI API的GPT-4 [2]。对于每个LMP，我们在提示中包含5-20个示例查询及其对应响应。图2给出了一个示例（为清晰起见进行了简化）。完整提示见附录。

items.en: VLMs and Perception. Given an object/part query from LLMs, we first invoke open-vocab detector OWL-ViT [15] to obtain a bounding box, then feed it into Segment Anything [118] to obtain a mask, and finally track the mask using video tracker XMEM [119]. The tracked mask is used with RGB-D observation to reconstruct the object/part point cloud.
items.zh: VLM与感知。给定来自LLM的对象/部件查询，我们首先调用开放词汇检测器OWL-ViT [15]获取边界框，然后将其输入Segment Anything [118]获取掩码，最后使用视频跟踪器XMEM [119]跟踪掩码。跟踪的掩码与RGB-D观测结合，用于重建对象/部件点云。

items.en: Value Map Composition. We define the following types of value maps: affordance, avoidance, end-effector velocity, end-effector rotation, and gripper action. Each type uses a different LMP, which takes in an instruction and outputs a voxel map of shape (100,100,100,k)100100100𝑘(100,100,100,k), where k𝑘k differs for each value map (e.g., k=1𝑘1k=1 for affordance and avoidance as it specifies cost, and k=4𝑘4k=4 for rotation as it specifies SO(3)3(3)). We apply Euclidean distance transform to affordance maps and Gaussian filters for avoidance maps. On top of value map LMPs, we define two high-level LMPs to orchestrate their behaviors: planner takes user instruction ℒℒ\mathcal{L} as input (e.g., “open drawer”) and outputs a sequence of sub-tasks ℓ1:Nsubscriptℓ:1𝑁\ell_{1:N}, and composer takes in sub-task ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i} and invokes relevant value map LMPs with detailed language parameterization.
items.zh: 价值图组合。我们定义以下类型的价值图：可操作性、避障、末端执行器速度、末端执行器旋转和夹爪动作。每种类型使用不同的LMP，该LMP接收指令并输出形状为(100,100,100,k)的体素图，其中k因价值图而异（例如，可操作性和避障的k=1，因为它指定成本；旋转的k=4，因为它指定SO(3)）。我们对可操作性图应用欧几里得距离变换，对避障图应用高斯滤波器。在价值图LMP之上，我们定义了两个高级LMP来协调其行为：规划器接收用户指令ℒ（例如，“打开抽屉”）并输出子任务序列ℓ₁:ₙ；组合器接收子任务ℓᵢ并调用相关价值图LMP，附带详细的语言参数化。

items.en: Motion Planner. We consider only affordance and avoidance maps in the planner optimization, which finds a sequence of collision-free end-effector positions p1:N∈ℝ3subscript𝑝:1𝑁superscriptℝ3p_{1:N}\in\mathbb{R}^{3} using greedy search. Then we enforce other parametrization at each p𝑝p by the remaining value maps (e.g., rotation map, velocity map). The cost map used by the motion planner is computed as the negative of the weighted sum of normalized affordance and avoidance maps with weights 222 and 111. After a 6-DoF trajectory is synthesized, the first waypoint is executed, and then a new trajectory is re-planned at 5 Hz.
items.zh: 运动规划器。我们在规划器优化中仅考虑可操作性和避障图，通过贪心搜索找到一系列无碰撞的末端执行器位置p₁:ₙ ∈ ℝ³。然后，在每个位置p处，通过剩余价值图（例如，旋转图、速度图）强制执行其他参数化。运动规划器使用的成本图计算为归一化可操作性图和避障图的加权和（权重分别为2和1）的负值。合成6自由度轨迹后，执行第一个路径点，然后以5 Hz的频率重新规划新轨迹。

items.en: Dynamics Model. We use the known robot dynamics model in all tasks, where it is used in motion planning for the end-effector to follow the waypoints. For the majority of our considered tasks where the “entity of interest” is the robot, no environment dynamics model is used (i.e., scene is assumed to be static), but we replan at every step to account for the latest observation. For tasks in which the “entity of interest” is an object, we study only a planar pushing model parametrized by contact point, push direction, and push distance. We use a heuristic-based dynamics model that translates an input point cloud along the push direction by the push distance. We use MPC with random shooting to optimize for the action parameters. Then a pre-defined pushing primitive is executed based on the action parameters. However, we note that a primitive is not necessary when action parameters are defined over the end-effector or joint space of the robot, which would likely yield smoother trajectories but takes more time for optimization. We also explore the use of a learning-based dynamics model in Section 4.3, which enables VoxPoser to benefit from online experiences.
items.zh: 动力学模型。我们在所有任务中使用已知的机器人动力学模型，该模型用于运动规划，使末端执行器跟随路径点。对于大多数考虑的任务，其中“感兴趣实体”是机器人，不使用环境动力学模型（即假设场景是静态的），但我们在每一步重新规划以考虑最新观测。对于“感兴趣实体”是物体的任务，我们仅研究一个由接触点、推动方向和推动距离参数化的平面推动模型。我们使用基于启发式的动力学模型，该模型将输入点云沿推动方向平移推动距离。我们使用带有随机采样的MPC来优化动作参数。然后，基于动作参数执行预定义的推动原语。然而，我们注意到，当动作参数在末端执行器或机器人关节空间上定义时，原语并非必需，这可能会产生更平滑的轨迹，但需要更多优化时间。我们还在第4.3节中探索了基于学习的动力学模型的使用，这使得VoxPoser能够从在线经验中受益。

full.secZh: 4.1 VoxPoser在日常操作任务中的应用

items.en: We study whether VoxPoser can zero-shot synthesize robot trajectories to perform everyday manipulation tasks in the real world. Details of the environment setup can be found in Appendix A.4. While the proposed method can generalize to an open-set of instructions and an open-set of objects as shown in Fig. 1, we pick 5 representative tasks to provide quantitative evaluations in Table 1. Qualitative results including environment rollouts and value map visualizations are shown in Fig. 3. We find that VoxPoser can effectively synthesize robot trajectories for everyday manipulation tasks with a high average success rate. Due to fast replanning capabilities, it is also robust to external disturbances, such as moving targets/obstacles and pulling the drawer open after it has been closed by the robot. We further compare to a variant of Code as Policies [75] that uses LLMs to parameterize a pre-defined list of simple primitives (e.g., move_to_pose, open_gripper). We find that compared to chaining sequential policy logic, the ability to compose spatially while considering other constraints under a joint optimization scheme is a more flexible formulation, unlocking the possibility for more manipulation tasks and leading to more robust execution.
items.zh: 我们研究VoxPoser是否能够零样本合成机器人轨迹，以在真实世界中执行日常操作任务。环境设置的详细信息见附录A.4。虽然所提出的方法可以泛化到开放指令集和开放对象集（如图1所示），但我们选择了5个代表性任务，在表1中提供定量评估。定性结果（包括环境部署和价值图可视化）如图3所示。我们发现VoxPoser能够以较高的平均成功率有效合成日常操作任务的机器人轨迹。由于快速重新规划能力，它对外部干扰也具有鲁棒性，例如移动目标/障碍物以及在机器人关闭抽屉后将其拉开。我们进一步与Code as Policies [75]的一个变体进行比较，该变体使用LLM参数化预定义的简单原语列表（例如，move_to_pose, open_gripper）。我们发现，与链式顺序策略逻辑相比，在联合优化方案下考虑其他约束的同时进行空间组合是一种更灵活的公式，为更多操作任务解锁了可能性，并导致更鲁棒的执行。

full.sec: 4.2 Generalization to Unseen Instructions and Attributes
full.secZh: 4.2 对未见指令和属性的泛化

items.en: To provide rigorous quantitative evaluations on generalization, we set up a simulated block-world environment that mirrors our real-world robot setup [120, 121] but features 13 highly-randomizable tasks with 2766 unique instructions. Eash task comes with a templated instruction (e.g., “push [obj] to [pos]”) that contains randomizable attributes chosen from a pre-defined list. Details are in Appendix A.5. Seen instructions/attributes may appear in the prompt (or in the training data for supervised baselines). The tasks are grouped into 2 categories, where “Object Interactions” are tasks that require interactions with objects, and “Spatial Composition” are tasks involving spatial constraints (e.g., moving slower near a particular object). For baselines, we ablate the two components of VoxPoser, LLM and motion planner, by comparing to a variant of [75] that combines an LLM with primitives and to a variant of [50] that learns a U-Net [122] to synthesize costmaps for motion planning. Table 2 shows the success rates averaged across 20 episodes per task. We find VoxPoser exhibits superior generalization in all scenarios. Compared to learned cost specification, LLMs generalize better by explicitly reasoning about affordances and constraints. On the other hand, grounding LLM knowledge in robot perception through value map composition rather than directly specifying primitive parameters offers more flexibility and better generalization.
items.zh: 为了提供关于泛化能力的严格定量评估，我们设置了一个模拟块世界环境，该环境镜像了我们的真实世界机器人设置[120, 121]，但包含13个高度随机化的任务和2766个独特指令。每个任务都有一个模板化指令（例如，“将[物体]推到[位置]”），其中包含从预定义列表中选择的可随机化属性。详细信息见附录A.5。已见过的指令/属性可能出现在提示中（或监督基线的训练数据中）。任务分为两类：“对象交互”是需要与对象交互的任务，“空间组合”是涉及空间约束的任务（例如，在特定物体附近移动更慢）。对于基线，我们通过比较[75]的一个变体（将LLM与原语结合）和[50]的一个变体（学习U-Net [122]合成运动规划的成本图），消融了VoxPoser的两个组件：LLM和运动规划器。表2显示了每个任务20个episode的平均成功率。我们发现VoxPoser在所有场景中表现出优越的泛化能力。与学习成本规范相比，LLM通过显式推理可操作性和约束实现了更好的泛化。另一方面，通过价值图组合将LLM知识扎根于机器人感知，而不是直接指定原语参数，提供了更大的灵活性和更好的泛化能力。

full.sec: 4.3 Efficient Dynamics Learning with Online Experiences
full.secZh: 4.3 利用在线经验的高效动力学学习

items.capEn: Figure 4: Error breakdown of components. VoxPoser significantly reduces specification error.
items.capZh: 图4：组件错误分解。VoxPoser显著降低了规范错误。

items.en: As discussed in Sec. 3.4, we investigate how VoxPoser can optionally benefit from online experiences for tasks that involve more intricacies of contact, such as opening doors, fridges, and windows, in a simulated environment. Specifically, we first synthesize k𝑘k zero-shot trajectories using VoxPoser, each represented as a sequence of end-effector waypoints, that act as priors for exploration (e.g., “handle needs to be pressed down first in order to open a door”). Then an MLP dynamics model is learned through an iterative procedure where the agent alternates between data collection and model learning. During data collection, we add ε∼𝒩​(0,σ2)similar-to𝜀𝒩0superscript𝜎2\varepsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^{2}) to each waypoint in τ0𝐫subscriptsuperscript𝜏𝐫0\tau^{\mathbf{r}}_{0} to encourage local exploration. As shown in Tab. 3, we find zero-shot synthesized trajectories are typically meaningful but insufficient. However, we can learn an effective dynamics model with less than 3 minutes of online interactions by using these trajectories as exploration prior, leading to high eventual success rates. In comparison, exploring without prior all exceed the maximum 12-hour limit.
items.zh: 如第3.4节所述，我们研究了VoxPoser如何可选地从在线经验中受益，以处理涉及更复杂接触的任务，例如在模拟环境中开门、冰箱和窗户。具体来说，我们首先使用VoxPoser合成k条零样本轨迹，每条轨迹表示为末端执行器路径点序列，作为探索的先验（例如，“需要先按下把手才能开门”）。然后，通过迭代过程学习MLP动力学模型，其中智能体在数据收集和模型学习之间交替。在数据收集期间，我们向τ₀ʳ中的每个路径点添加ε ∼ 𝒩(0, σ²)以鼓励局部探索。如表3所示，我们发现零样本合成的轨迹通常有意义但不足。然而，通过使用这些轨迹作为探索先验，我们可以在不到3分钟的在线交互中学习有效的动力学模型，从而实现高最终成功率。相比之下，没有先验的探索都超过了12小时的最大限制。

items.en: In this section, we analyze the errors resulting from each component of VoxPoser and how the overall system can be further improved. We conduct experiments in simulation where we have access to ground-truth perception and dynamics model (i.e., the simulator). . “Dynamics error” refers to errors made by the dynamics model444LLM + Primitives [75] does not use model-based planning, thus not having a dynamics module.. “Perception error” refers to errors made by the perception module555U-Net + MP [50] maps RGB-D to costmaps using U-Net [122, 123], thus not having perception module. Errors by which are attributed to “specification error”.. “Specification error” refers to errors made by the module specifying cost or parameters for the low-level motion planner or primitives. Examples for each method include 1) noisy prediction by the U-Net, 2) incorrect parameters specified by the LLM, and 3) incorrect value maps specified by the LLM. As shown in Fig. 4, VoxPoser achieves lowest “specification error” due to its generalization and flexibility. We also find that having access to a more robust perception pipeline and a physically-realistic dynamics model can contribute to better overall performance. This observation aligns with our real-world experiment, where most errors are from perception. For example, we find that the detector is sensitive to initial poses of objects and is less robust when detecting object parts.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们分析VoxPoser每个组件导致的错误以及如何进一步改进整个系统。我们在仿真中进行实验，其中我们可以访问真实感知和动力学模型（即仿真器）。“动力学错误”指动力学模型¹⁴造成的错误。“感知错误”指感知模块¹⁵造成的错误。“规范错误”指为低级运动规划器或原语指定成本或参数的模块造成的错误。每种方法的示例包括：1) U-Net的噪声预测，2) LLM指定的错误参数，以及3) LLM指定的错误价值图。如图4所示，VoxPoser由于其泛化能力和灵活性实现了最低的“规范错误”。我们还发现，拥有更鲁棒的感知流水线和物理真实的动力学模型有助于提高整体性能。这一观察与我们的真实世界实验一致，其中大多数错误来自感知。例如，我们发现检测器对物体的初始姿态敏感，并且在检测物体部件时鲁棒性较差。

full.secZh: 5 结论、局限性与未来工作

items.en: In this work, we present VoxPoser, a general framework for extracting affordances and constraints, grounded in 3D perceptual space, from LLMs and VLMs for everyday manipulation tasks in the real world, offering significant generalization advantages for open-set instructions and objects. Despite compelling results, VoxPoser has several limitations. First, it relies on external perception modules, which is limiting in tasks that require holistic visual reasoning or understanding of fine-grained object geometries. Second, while applicable to efficient dynamics learning, a general-purpose dynamics model is still required to achieve contact-rich tasks with the same level of generalization. Third, our motion planner considers only end-effector trajectories while whole-arm planning is also feasible and likely a better design choice [124, 125, 126]. Finally, manual prompt engineering is required for LLMs. We also see several exciting venues for future work. For instance, recent success of multi-modal LLMs [68, 2, 127] can be directly translated into VoxPoser for direct visual grounding. Methods developed for alignment [128, 129] and prompting [130, 131, 132, 133] may be used to alleviate prompt engineering effort. Finally, more advanced trajectory optimization methods can be developed that best interface with value maps synthesized by VoxPoser.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了VoxPoser，一个通用框架，用于从LLM和VLM中提取可操作性和约束，并将其扎根于3D感知空间，用于真实世界的日常操作任务，为开放指令和对象提供了显著的泛化优势。尽管结果令人信服，但VoxPoser存在几个局限性。首先，它依赖于外部感知模块，这在需要整体视觉推理或理解细粒度物体几何的任务中受到限制。其次，虽然适用于高效动力学学习，但实现接触丰富任务并具有相同泛化水平仍需要通用动力学模型。第三，我们的运动规划器仅考虑末端执行器轨迹，而全臂规划也是可行的，并且可能是更好的设计选择[124, 125, 126]。最后，LLM需要手动提示工程。我们也看到了几个令人兴奋的未来工作方向。例如，多模态LLM [68, 2, 127]的最新成功可以直接转化为VoxPoser，用于直接视觉扎根。为对齐[128, 129]和提示[130, 131, 132, 133]开发的方法可用于减轻提示工程工作。最后，可以开发更先进的轨迹优化方法，以最佳方式与VoxPoser合成的价值图接口。
